data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify employs a microservices architecture to manage its services independently.
data.technical_spec: Services are deployed independently and communicate through APIs.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Spotify uses CDN to stream music efficiently to users globally.
data.technical_spec: Caches music content at edge locations to reduce latency.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Distributes user requests across multiple servers to ensure high availability.

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: Database is partitioned to handle massive volumes of data efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Data is divided into shards based on user IDs.

data.title: Containerization
data.description: Uses Docker containers to deploy and manage applications.
data.technical_spec: Standardizes development environments and deployment processes.
